projects.title: Online Car Marketplace Application
projects.bodyText:
- Developed a mobile application for vehicle listings, search, and inventory management.
- Implemented multi-layered Flutter architecture with Provider for state management.
- Integrated Firebase Auth, Firestore, and Cloudinary for secure data and image hosting.
- Established CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions for automated testing and building.

projects.title: Stylo – AI-Powered Fashion App
projects.bodyText:
- Led a team to build an end-to-end system including an ASP.NET Core Web API and Flutter app.
- Engineered a TF-IDF based recommendation system deployed via FastAPI.
- Optimized SQL Server databases and managed project milestones and code reviews.
- Seamlessly integrated AI services with the mobile retail interface.

projects.title: BookStore – Desktop Management System
projects.bodyText:
- Designed a 3-layer architecture (GUI, BUS, DAL) WinForms system for retail management.
- Implemented business logic for order processing, automated stock updates, and revenue tracking.
- Built reporting modules with PDF export using Spire.Office.
- Features advanced search and filtering for books, invoices, and supplier operations.
